headline: AT&T Faces Emergency Network Review And New Questions For Investors
summary: Federal authorities and lawmakers are increasing scrutiny of AT&T’s emergency communications network after recent failures during emergencies. The review focuses on the reliability of infrastructure that supports critical public safety and national emergency communications. Regulators and government officials are discussing potential changes to AT&T’s systems, oversight, and contractual terms with federal agencies. For investors watching NYSE:T, the attention on AT&T’s emergency network...
